title: GitHub - riponcm/Jharu: Free open source disk cleaner for developers. Clean Hugging Face, Ollama, npm, pip, conda, Docker caches, app leftovers, and junk files on macOS and Windows. Built with Tauri.
excerpt: Free open source disk cleaner for developers. Clean Hugging Face, Ollama, npm, pip, conda, Docker caches, app leftovers, and junk files on macOS and Windows. Built with Tauri. - riponcm/Jharu
content_html:
Free, open source disk cleaner and storage analyzer for developers — macOS and Windows

Jharu finds and safely removes the gigabytes that development tools leave behind: machine learning model caches, package manager caches, Docker data, leftovers from uninstalled apps, and forgotten junk files — all from one professional dashboard.

Download

 

macOS installer is universal (Apple Silicon and Intel). Windows installer is 64-bit.
Current version: v0.2.0 · All releases and release notes

What is Jharu?

Jharu is a desktop disk cleanup app built specifically for software developers and machine learning engineers. Generic disk space analyzers show you folder sizes; Jharu understands what the data actually is. It ships a knowledge base of known cache and data locations, classifies everything it finds, explains each item in plain language, rates how safe it is to delete, and moves removed data to the Trash or Recycle Bin — never a permanent delete.

Typical problems Jharu solves:

  • Disk full after downloading machine learning models with Hugging Face, Ollama, PyTorch, or Whisper
  • Gigabytes hidden in npm, pip, uv, yarn, pnpm, conda, Cargo, Go, Gradle, Maven, and NuGet caches
  • Leftover settings, caches, and support files from apps you uninstalled long ago
  • Old installers, phone backups, logs, and large files you have not touched in months
  • Not knowing what is actually using your disk space

Watch the demo

See a scan, a plain-English breakdown, and a click to clean — with the real numbers from a real machine.

▶ Watch on YouTube — reclaiming gigabytes in under a minute

Screenshots

Dev clean — every known cache location, sized and rated

ML models — 21.1 GB of the 21.7 GB here was downloaded and never loaded once

Deep clean — folders sized by what they hold, and an honest notice about what could not be read

Features

ML models — keep what you use, remove what you never loaded. Every downloaded model listed individually, across Hugging Face, Ollama, Whisper, PyTorch and Keras. Jharu distinguishes models you have actually loaded from models that were downloaded once and never opened since, so you can reclaim the second kind without touching the first. Ollama layers shared between models are kept, so removing one model never breaks another. No other cleaner makes this distinction.

Dev clean. Scans 25+ known developer and machine learning cache locations — Hugging Face, Ollama, PyTorch, Whisper, LM Studio, conda, pip, uv, npm, yarn, pnpm, Cargo, Go modules, Gradle, Maven, NuGet, Homebrew, Xcode DerivedData, Docker, JetBrains, Playwright, Puppeteer — with per-item safety ratings and staleness detection.

Python environments. Finds every virtualenv and conda environment, sizes the packages inside them, and shows what duplication costs across environments — the "torch is installed eleven times" problem, quantified.

Deep clean. Full-disk analysis as a treemap or a list. Folders are sized by what they hold and classified as system, applications, your files, app data or developer data. Click a block to go inside it. System locations are protected and can never be cleaned from the app.

Junk files. Non-cache junk: installers and archives in Downloads, old device backups, logs and crash reports, mail attachment copies, large files untouched for six months, and on Windows the temp folders, Windows Update cache, Delivery Optimization files and crash dumps.

Desktop. Screenshots and clutter on your desktop, filterable by type and age. Because these are your own files, archiving them to a folder is the default action rather than deleting.

Browsers. Detects Chrome, Edge, Brave, Arc, Firefox and Safari, and itemizes their caches per profile, separating safe-to-clear cache from data that deserves review.

Uninstaller. Lists installed applications with both their own size and the data they have accumulated across the system. On Windows it reads the registry and runs each program's own uninstaller; on macOS it removes the bundle. Either way it then sweeps the leftovers, with high-confidence matches preselected.

Drive health. Capacity and SMART status per drive, plus a fill forecast built from a daily capacity reading that projects when a drive will run out of space. Wear level, temperature and power-on hours are shown when smartctl is available.

In-app updates. Jharu checks GitHub releases for new versions and downloads and installs them from inside the app — signed, verified, and with a one-click restart.

How Jharu compares

Generic cleaners are built to look busy and sell a subscription. Jharu does one thing deeply: the developer and AI data no general-purpose cleaner understands.

Jharu CleanMyMac CCleaner
Price Free forever $40+/yr Freemium
Open source Yes · Apache 2.0 No No
Understands ML model caches Yes No No
Used vs never-loaded detection Yes No No
Telemetry / tracking None Yes Yes
macOS and Windows Both macOS only Both
Registry "cleaner" Never (it does not work) — Yes

What can Jharu clean?

Category Examples
ML model caches Hugging Face hub (~/.cache/huggingface), Ollama models (~/.ollama/models), PyTorch hub, Whisper, Keras, LM Studio
Python pip cache, uv cache, conda package cache, stale conda environments
JavaScript npm cache (~/.npm/_cacache), yarn cache, pnpm store, Puppeteer and Playwright browser downloads
Build tools Xcode DerivedData and archives, Gradle caches, Maven repository, Cargo registry, Go module cache, NuGet packages
Containers Docker VM data and image storage
IDEs JetBrains caches, editor cache directories
App leftovers Support files, caches, preferences, and logs from uninstalled applications
Junk Installers in Downloads, old device backups, crash reports, mail attachment copies, large stale files

Safety model

  • Nothing is ever permanently deleted. Every clean action moves data to the Trash or Recycle Bin, where it can be restored.
  • Every finding carries a safety rating: safe to clear, re-downloadable, or review first.
  • Operating system locations are protected and excluded from cleaning entirely.
  • Every clean is confirmed by a dialog that states the actual consequence — a cache rebuilds itself, a model is re-downloaded, an environment must be recreated, your own files are gone for good.
  • A location Jharu cannot read is reported, never hidden. A folder needing elevated rights measures 0 B, which looks exactly like an empty one; Jharu flags these as partly unreadable instead of quietly leaving them out. A cleaner that hides what it cannot see is worse than one that admits it.
  • No registry cleaner, and Windows prefetch is listed but never cleaned. Both are widely marketed and neither does anything useful; prefetch is how Windows starts your apps quickly, and clearing it makes the next launches slower.

Installation

Prebuilt installers for macOS (Apple Silicon and Intel) and Windows are published on the releases page. Once installed, Jharu updates itself in-app.

Build from source

Prerequisites: Rust (stable) and Node.js 20+.

git clone https://github.com/riponcm/Jharu.git
cd Jharu
npm install
npm run tauri dev      # run in development
npm run tauri build    # produce installers for your platform

On macOS, grant Full Disk Access (System Settings, Privacy and Security) for complete scan coverage. Jharu detects missing access and offers to open the right settings pane.

Opening Jharu the first time

Jharu is not yet signed with a paid developer certificate (see Support Jharu below), so your operating system shows a one-time warning the first time you open it. This is expected for open source apps and does not mean anything is wrong — the download is verified by a cryptographic signature on every in-app update.

  • macOS: if you see "Jharu cannot be opened because Apple cannot verify it", right-click (or Control-click) the app and choose Open, then confirm. You only do this once.
  • Windows: if SmartScreen shows "Windows protected your PC", click More info, then Run anyway.

Frequently asked questions

How do I clear the Hugging Face model cache? Open Jharu's Dev clean tab. It lists your Hugging Face hub cache (~/.cache/huggingface) with its exact size and lets you explore it or move it to the Trash. Models are re-downloaded automatically the next time a library requests them.

Is it safe to delete npm, pip, or other package manager caches? Yes. These caches only speed up reinstalls and are rebuilt automatically on the next install. Jharu marks them "Safe to clear". Deleting an active project's node_modules or a conda environment you still use is different — Jharu rates those "Review first".

Does Jharu permanently delete my files? No. Every clean action moves data to the macOS Trash or Windows Recycle Bin, where it can be restored. Jharu never bypasses the Trash.

Is Jharu a free alternative to CleanMyMac or CCleaner? Yes. Jharu is free and open source under the Apache 2.0 license, with no subscription, telemetry, or upsell. Its focus is narrower and deeper: developer and machine learning data that general-purpose cleaners do not understand.

How do I find out what is taking up disk space on my Mac or Windows PC? Jharu's Deep clean tab analyzes the whole disk and shows every folder's real size, classified by what it is — system files, applications, your documents, app data, or developer data — so you can tell junk from data that matters.

How do I completely uninstall an app, including leftover files? Jharu's Uninstaller lists every installed app together with the data it has accumulated. Uninstalling removes the app and its leftover support files, caches, and preferences in one step.

Architecture

Layer Technology
Scanner Rust with parallel directory walking (jwalk)
Safety OS trash integration (trash), never permanent deletion
Rules Per-platform knowledge base of cache and data locations
UI React and TypeScript, Tauri 2 WebView
Updates tauri-plugin-updater with signed GitHub release artifacts
Drive info sysinfo, with SMART via diskutil and optional smartctl
Windows winreg for the uninstall keys; per-platform paths throughout
Trend A daily capacity reading stored locally, fitted by least squares

Roadmap

  • Orphaned-data detection by comparing leftover folders against installed applications
  • Duplicate file detection
  • Detailed drive health on Windows, which currently reports capacity only
  • Localized UI, starting with Bengali and Hindi

Shipped in 0.2.0: per-model ML intelligence, Python environment analysis, the desktop cleaner, Windows uninstaller and junk rules, the deep clean treemap and the fill forecast. See the changelog.

Support Jharu

Jharu is free, open source, and has no ads, telemetry, or paid tier — and it always will. But shipping a desktop app that users can install without scary security warnings costs real money every year, and that is the one thing an individual developer cannot absorb alone:

What it unlocks Cost
Apple notarization — removes the "Apple cannot verify this app" warning on every Mac 99 USD / year (Apple Developer Program)
Windows code signing — removes the "Windows protected your PC" SmartScreen warning ~100–400 USD / year (code signing certificate)

Every star and every sponsorship goes directly toward these costs. If Jharu reclaimed gigabytes of your disk, here is how you can pay it forward in seconds:

  • Star the repository. It is free, it takes one click, and it is the single biggest thing that helps other developers discover Jharu.
  • Sponsor the project. Even a one-time contribution the size of a coffee helps cover the signing certificates that make Jharu safe and frictionless for everyone to install. Use the Sponsor button at the top of this repository.
  • Spread the word. Share Jharu with a teammate whose disk is always full, or post about it — reach is what turns a side project into a maintained tool.

Once the signing costs are covered, every release will install cleanly on macOS and Windows with no warnings at all. Thank you for helping keep Jharu free and independent.

Contributing

Issues and pull requests are welcome. For substantial changes, open an issue first to discuss the approach. New cache locations for the knowledge base are especially appreciated — include the path per platform, what writes it, and whether it regenerates.

License

Licensed under the Apache License 2.0.

Acknowledgements

Jharu draws inspiration from the open source projects ClearDisk, Pearcleaner, PureMac, SquirrelDisk, and kondo.

Jharu distinguishes models you have actually loaded from models that were downloaded once and never opened since, so you can reclaim the second kind without touching the first. Ollama layers shared between models are kept, so removing one model never breaks another. No other cleaner makes this distinction.

sentences.en: ML models — keep what you use, remove what you never loaded.
sentences.zh: ML 模型 — 保留您使用的内容，删除您从未加载的内容。

sentences.en: Every downloaded model listed individually, across Hugging Face, Ollama, Whisper, PyTorch and Keras.
sentences.zh: 每个下载的模型都单独列出，包括 Hugging Face、Ollama、Whisper、PyTorch 和 Keras。

sentences.en: Jharu distinguishes models you have actually loaded from models that were downloaded once and never opened since, so you can reclaim the second kind without touching the first.
sentences.zh: Jharu 将您实际加载的模型与下载过一次且此后从未打开过的模型区分开来，因此您可以回收第二种模型而无需触及第一种模型。

sentences.en: Ollama layers shared between models are kept, so removing one model never breaks another.
sentences.zh: 保留模型之间共享的 Ollama 层，因此删除一个模型绝不会破坏另一个模型。

sentences.en: No other cleaner makes this distinction.
sentences.zh: 没有其他清洁工能做到这一点。

blocks.html_en: Dev clean. Scans 25+ known developer and machine learning cache locations — Hugging Face, Ollama, PyTorch, Whisper, LM Studio, conda, pip, uv, npm, yarn, pnpm, Cargo, Go modules, Gradle, Maven, NuGet, Homebrew, Xcode DerivedData, Docker, JetBrains, Playwright, Puppeteer — with per-item safety ratings and staleness detection.

sentences.en: Dev clean.
sentences.zh: 开发干净。

sentences.en: Scans 25+ known developer and machine learning cache locations — Hugging Face, Ollama, PyTorch, Whisper, LM Studio, conda, pip, uv, npm, yarn, pnpm, Cargo, Go modules, Gradle, Maven, NuGet, Homebrew, Xcode DerivedData, Docker, JetBrains, Playwright, Puppeteer — with per-item safety ratings and staleness detection.
sentences.zh: 扫描 25 个以上已知的开发人员和机器学习缓存位置 - Hugging Face、Ollama、PyTorch、Whisper、LM Studio、conda、pip、uv、npm、yarn、pnpm、Cargo、Go 模块、Gradle、Maven、NuGet、Homebrew、Xcode DerivedData、Docker、JetBrains、Playwright、Puppeteer - 提供每个项目的安全评级和过时检测。

blocks.html_en: Python environments. Finds every virtualenv and conda environment, sizes the packages inside them, and shows what duplication costs across environments — the "torch is installed eleven times" problem, quantified.

sentences.en: Python environments.
sentences.zh: Python 环境。

sentences.en: Finds every virtualenv and conda environment, sizes the packages inside them, and shows what duplication costs across environments — the "torch is installed eleven times" problem, quantified.
sentences.zh: 查找每个 virtualenv 和 conda 环境，调整其中的包大小，并显示跨环境的重复成本 - 量化“torch 安装了 11 次”问题。

blocks.html_en: Deep clean. Full-disk analysis as a treemap or a list. Folders are sized by what they hold and classified as system, applications, your files, app data or developer data. Click a block to go inside it. System locations are protected and can never be cleaned from the app.

sentences.en: Deep clean.
sentences.zh: 深层清洁。

sentences.en: Full-disk analysis as a treemap or a list.
sentences.zh: 以树形图或列表形式进行全磁盘分析。

sentences.en: Folders are sized by what they hold and classified as system, applications, your files, app data or developer data.
sentences.zh: 文件夹的大小取决于其所容纳的内容，并分为系统、应用程序、文件、应用程序数据或开发人员数据。

sentences.en: Click a block to go inside it.
sentences.zh: 单击一个块即可进入​​其中。

sentences.en: System locations are protected and can never be cleaned from the app.
sentences.zh: 系统位置受到保护，永远无法从应用程序中清除。

blocks.html_en: Junk files. Non-cache junk: installers and archives in Downloads, old device backups, logs and crash reports, mail attachment copies, large files untouched for six months, and on Windows the temp folders, Windows Update cache, Delivery Optimization files and crash dumps.

sentences.en: Junk files.
sentences.zh: 垃圾文件。

sentences.en: Non-cache junk: installers and archives in Downloads, old device backups, logs and crash reports, mail attachment copies, large files untouched for six months, and on Windows the temp folders, Windows Update cache, Delivery Optimization files and crash dumps.
sentences.zh: 非缓存垃圾：下载中的安装程序和存档、旧设备备份、日志和崩溃报告、邮件附件副本、六个月未触及的大文件，以及 Windows 上的临时文件夹、Windows 更新缓存、传递优化文件和故障转储。

blocks.html_en: Desktop. Screenshots and clutter on your desktop, filterable by type and age. Because these are your own files, archiving them to a folder is the default action rather than deleting.

sentences.en: Desktop.
sentences.zh: 桌面。

sentences.en: Screenshots and clutter on your desktop, filterable by type and age.
sentences.zh: 桌面上的屏幕截图和杂乱内容，可按类型和年龄进行过滤。

sentences.en: Because these are your own files, archiving them to a folder is the default action rather than deleting.
sentences.zh: 由于这些是您自己的文件，因此默认操作是将它们存档到文件夹而不是删除。

blocks.html_en: Browsers. Detects Chrome, Edge, Brave, Arc, Firefox and Safari, and itemizes their caches per profile, separating safe-to-clear cache from data that deserves review.

sentences.en: Browsers.
sentences.zh: 浏览器。

sentences.en: Detects Chrome, Edge, Brave, Arc, Firefox and Safari, and itemizes their caches per profile, separating safe-to-clear cache from data that deserves review.
sentences.zh: 检测 Chrome、Edge、Brave、Arc、Firefox 和 Safari，并逐项列出每个配置文件的缓存，将安全清除的缓存与值得审查的数据分开。

blocks.html_en: Uninstaller. Lists installed applications with both their own size and the data they have accumulated across the system. On Windows it reads the registry and runs each program's own uninstaller; on macOS it removes the bundle. Either way it then sweeps the leftovers, with high-confidence matches preselected.

sentences.en: Uninstaller.
sentences.zh: 卸载程序。

sentences.en: Lists installed applications with both their own size and the data they have accumulated across the system.
sentences.zh: 列出已安装的应用程序及其自身的大小以及它们在系统中积累的数据。

sentences.en: On Windows it reads the registry and runs each program's own uninstaller; on macOS it removes the bundle.
sentences.zh: 在 Windows 上，它读取注册表并运行每个程序自己的卸载程序；在 macOS 上，它会删除该捆绑包。

sentences.en: Either way it then sweeps the leftovers, with high-confidence matches preselected.
sentences.zh: 无论哪种方式，它都会清除剩余的内容，并预先选择高可信度的匹配项。

blocks.html_en: Drive health. Capacity and SMART status per drive, plus a fill forecast built from a daily capacity reading that projects when a drive will run out of space. Wear level, temperature and power-on hours are shown when smartctl is available.

sentences.en: Drive health.
sentences.zh: 推动健康。

sentences.en: Capacity and SMART status per drive, plus a fill forecast built from a daily capacity reading that projects when a drive will run out of space.
sentences.zh: 每个驱动器的容量和 SMART 状态，以及根据每日容量读数构建的填充预测，预测驱动器何时会用完空间。

sentences.en: Wear level, temperature and power-on hours are shown when smartctl is available.
sentences.zh: 当 smartctl 可用时，会显示磨损程度、温度和开机时间。

blocks.html_en: In-app updates. Jharu checks GitHub releases for new versions and downloads and installs them from inside the app — signed, verified, and with a one-click restart.

sentences.en: In-app updates.
sentences.zh: 应用内更新。

sentences.en: Jharu checks GitHub releases for new versions and downloads and installs them from inside the app — signed, verified, and with a one-click restart.
sentences.zh: Jharu 检查 GitHub 版本是否有新版本，并从应用程序内部下载并安装它们 - 签名、验证并一键重启。

sentences.en: How Jharu compares
sentences.zh: 贾鲁比较如何

sentences.en: Safety model
sentences.zh: 安全模型

blocks.html_en: • Nothing is ever permanently deleted. Every clean action moves data to the Trash or Recycle Bin, where it can be restored.

sentences.en: Nothing is ever permanently deleted.
sentences.zh: 没有任何东西会被永久删除。

sentences.en: Every clean action moves data to the Trash or Recycle Bin, where it can be restored.
sentences.zh: 每个清理操作都会将数据移至垃圾箱或回收站，以便可以将其恢复。

blocks.html_en: • Every finding carries a safety rating: safe to clear, re-downloadable, or review first.

sentences.en: Every finding carries a safety rating: safe to clear, re-downloadable, or review first.
sentences.zh: 每项发现都带有安全评级：可以安全清除、可重新下载或先审查。

blocks.html_en: • Operating system locations are protected and excluded from cleaning entirely.

sentences.en: Operating system locations are protected and excluded from cleaning entirely.
sentences.zh: 操作系统位置受到保护并完全排除在清理之外。

blocks.html_en: • Every clean is confirmed by a dialog that states the actual consequence — a cache rebuilds itself, a model is re-downloaded, an environment must be recreated, your own files are gone for good.

sentences.en: Every clean is confirmed by a dialog that states the actual consequence — a cache rebuilds itself, a model is re-downloaded, an environment must be recreated, your own files are gone for good.
sentences.zh: 每次清理都会通过一个对话框进行确认，该对话框会说明实际结果 - 缓存会自行重建，重新下载模型，必须重新创建环境，您自己的文件将永远消失。

blocks.html_en: • A location Jharu cannot read is reported, never hidden. A folder needing elevated rights measures 0 B, which looks exactly like an empty one; Jharu flags these as partly unreadable instead of quietly leaving them out. A cleaner that hides what it cannot see is worse than one that admits it.

sentences.en: A location Jharu cannot read is reported, never hidden.
sentences.zh: 贾鲁无法读取的位置会被报告，而不会被隐藏。

sentences.en: A folder needing elevated rights measures 0 B, which looks exactly like an empty one; Jharu flags these as partly unreadable instead of quietly leaving them out.
sentences.zh: 需要提升权限的文件夹的大小为 0 B，看起来与空文件夹一模一样；贾鲁将这些标记为部分不可读，而不是悄悄地将它们排除在外。

sentences.en: A cleaner that hides what it cannot see is worse than one that admits it.
sentences.zh: 隐藏看不见的东西的清洁工比承认它的清洁工更糟糕。

blocks.html_en: • No registry cleaner, and Windows prefetch is listed but never cleaned. Both are widely marketed and neither does anything useful; prefetch is how Windows starts your apps quickly, and clearing it makes the next launches slower.

sentences.en: No registry cleaner, and Windows prefetch is listed but never cleaned.
sentences.zh: 没有注册表清理程序，Windows 预取已列出但从未清理。

sentences.en: Both are widely marketed and neither does anything useful; prefetch is how Windows starts your apps quickly, and clearing it makes the next launches slower.
sentences.zh: 两者都被广泛销售，但都没有任何用处；预取是 Windows 快速启动应用程序的方式，清除它会使下次启动速度变慢。

sentences.en: Prebuilt installers for macOS (Apple Silicon and Intel) and Windows are published on the releases page.
sentences.zh: 适用于 macOS（Apple Silicon 和 Intel）和 Windows 的预构建安装程序已发布在发布页面上。

sentences.en: Once installed, Jharu updates itself in-app.
sentences.zh: 安装后，Jharu 会在应用程序内进行自我更新。

blocks.html_en: Prerequisites: Rust (stable) and Node.js 20+.

sentences.en: Prerequisites: Rust (stable) and Node.js 20+.
sentences.zh: 先决条件：Rust（稳定）和 Node.js 20+。

blocks.html_en: On macOS, grant Full Disk Access (System Settings, Privacy and Security) for complete scan coverage. Jharu detects missing access and offers to open the right settings pane.

sentences.en: On macOS, grant Full Disk Access (System Settings, Privacy and Security) for complete scan coverage.
sentences.zh: 在 macOS 上，授予完整磁盘访问权限（系统设置、隐私和安全）以实现完整的扫描覆盖。

sentences.en: Jharu detects missing access and offers to open the right settings pane.
sentences.zh: Jharu 检测到缺少访问权限并提议打开右侧的设置窗格。

blocks.html_en: Opening Jharu the first time

sentences.en: Opening Jharu the first time
sentences.zh: 第一次打开贾鲁

blocks.html_en: Jharu is not yet signed with a paid developer certificate (see Support Jharu below), so your operating system shows a one-time warning the first time you open it. This is expected for open source apps and does not mean anything is wrong — the download is verified by a cryptographic signature on every in-app update.

sentences.en: Jharu is not yet signed with a paid developer certificate (see Support Jharu below), so your operating system shows a one-time warning the first time you open it.
sentences.zh: Jharu 尚未使用付费开发者证书进行签名（请参阅下面的支持 Jharu），因此您的操作系统在您第一次打开它时会显示一次性警告。

sentences.en: This is expected for open source apps and does not mean anything is wrong — the download is verified by a cryptographic signature on every in-app update.
sentences.zh: 这是开源应用程序所期望的，并不意味着有任何问题 - 下载是通过每个应用程序内更新的加密签名进行验证的。

blocks.html_en: • macOS: if you see "Jharu cannot be opened because Apple cannot verify it", right-click (or Control-click) the app and choose Open, then confirm. You only do this once.

sentences.en: macOS: if you see "Jharu cannot be opened because Apple cannot verify it", right-click (or Control-click) the app and choose Open, then confirm.
sentences.zh: macOS：如果您看到“Jharu 无法打开，因为 Apple 无法验证它”，请右键单击（或按住 Control 键单击）该应用程序并选择“打开”，然后确认。

sentences.en: You only do this once.
sentences.zh: 您只需执行一次此操作。

blocks.html_en: • Windows: if SmartScreen shows "Windows protected your PC", click More info, then Run anyway.

sentences.en: Windows: if SmartScreen shows "Windows protected your PC", click More info, then Run anyway.
sentences.zh: Windows：如果 SmartScreen 显示“Windows 保护了您的电脑”，请单击“更多信息”，然后单击“仍然运行”。

sentences.en: Frequently asked questions
sentences.zh: 常见问题

blocks.html_en: How do I clear the Hugging Face model cache? Open Jharu's Dev clean tab. It lists your Hugging Face hub cache (~/.cache/huggingface) with its exact size and lets you explore it or move it to the Trash. Models are re-downloaded automatically the next time a library requests them.

sentences.en: How do I clear the Hugging Face model cache?
sentences.zh: 如何清除拥抱脸模型缓存？

sentences.en: Open Jharu's Dev clean tab.
sentences.zh: 打开 Jharu 的 Dev clean 选项卡。

sentences.en: It lists your Hugging Face hub cache (~/.cache/huggingface) with its exact size and lets you explore it or move it to the Trash.
sentences.zh: 它会列出您的 Hugging Face 中心缓存 (~/.cache/huggingface) 及其确切大小，并让您探索它或将其移至垃圾箱。

sentences.en: Models are re-downloaded automatically the next time a library requests them.
sentences.zh: 下次图书馆请求时，模型会自动重新下载。

blocks.html_en: Is it safe to delete npm, pip, or other package manager caches? Yes. These caches only speed up reinstalls and are rebuilt automatically on the next install. Jharu marks them "Safe to clear". Deleting an active project's node_modules or a conda environment you still use is different — Jharu rates those "Review first".

sentences.en: Is it safe to delete npm, pip, or other package manager caches?
sentences.zh: 删除 npm、pip 或其他包管理器缓存是否安全？

sentences.en: Yes.
sentences.zh: 是的。

sentences.en: These caches only speed up reinstalls and are rebuilt automatically on the next install.
sentences.zh: 这些缓存只会加快重新安装速度，并在下次安装时自动重建。

sentences.en: Jharu marks them "Safe to clear".
sentences.zh: 贾鲁将它们标记为“可以安全清除”。

sentences.en: Deleting an active project's node_modules or a conda environment you still use is different — Jharu rates those "Review first".
sentences.zh: 删除活动项目的 node_modules 或您仍在使用的 conda 环境是不同的 - Jharu 将这些评为“首先审核”。

blocks.html_en: Does Jharu permanently delete my files? No. Every clean action moves data to the macOS Trash or Windows Recycle Bin, where it can be restored. Jharu never bypasses the Trash.

sentences.en: Does Jharu permanently delete my files?
sentences.zh: Jharu 会永久删除我的文件吗？

sentences.en: No. Every clean action moves data to the macOS Trash or Windows Recycle Bin, where it can be restored.
sentences.zh: 不会。每个清理操作都会将数据移至 macOS 垃圾箱或 Windows 回收站，以便可以将其恢复。

sentences.en: Jharu never bypasses the Trash.
sentences.zh: 贾鲁从不绕过垃圾箱。

blocks.html_en: Is Jharu a free alternative to CleanMyMac or CCleaner? Yes. Jharu is free and open source under the Apache 2.0 license, with no subscription, telemetry, or upsell. Its focus is narrower and deeper: developer and machine learning data that general-purpose cleaners do not understand.

sentences.en: Is Jharu a free alternative to CleanMyMac or CCleaner?
sentences.zh: Jharu 是 CleanMyMac 或 CCleaner 的免费替代品吗？

sentences.en: Yes.
sentences.zh: 是的。

sentences.en: Jharu is free and open source under the Apache 2.0 license, with no subscription, telemetry, or upsell.
sentences.zh: Jharu 在 Apache 2.0 许可证下免费且开源，无需订阅、遥测或追加销售。

sentences.en: Its focus is narrower and deeper: developer and machine learning data that general-purpose cleaners do not understand.
sentences.zh: 它的关注点更窄、更深入：通用清洁工不理解的开发人员和机器学习数据。

blocks.html_en: How do I find out what is taking up disk space on my Mac or Windows PC? Jharu's Deep clean tab analyzes the whole disk and shows every folder's real size, classified by what it is — system files, applications, your documents, app data, or developer data — so you can tell junk from data that matters.

sentences.en: How do I find out what is taking up disk space on my Mac or Windows PC?
sentences.zh: 如何查明 Mac 或 Windows PC 上的磁盘空间被哪些内容占用？

content_html_zh:
为开发人员提供的免费开源磁盘清理器和存储分析器 - macOS 和 Windows

Jharu 找到并安全删除开发工具留下的千兆字节：机器学习模型缓存、包管理器缓存、Docker 数据、已卸载应用程序的剩余内容以及被遗忘的垃圾文件 - 所有这些都来自一个专业的仪表板。

下载

 

macOS 安装程序是通用的（Apple Silicon 和 Intel）。 Windows 安装程序是 64 位的。 当前版本：v0.2.0 · 所有版本和发行说明

贾鲁是什么？

Jharu 是一款专为软件开发人员和机器学习工程师打造的桌面磁盘清理应用程序。 通用磁盘空间分析器显示文件夹大小； Jharu 了解数据的实际含义。 它提供了已知缓存和数据位置的知识库，对找到的所有内容进行分类，用简单的语言解释每个项目，评估删除的安全性，并将删除的数据移至垃圾箱或回收站 - 而不是永久删除。

Jharu 解决的典型问题：

  • 使用 Hugging Face、Ollama、PyTorch 或 Whisper 下载机器学习模型后磁盘已满
  • npm、pip、uv、yarn、pnpm、conda、Cargo、Go、Gradle、Maven 和 NuGet 缓存中隐藏的千兆字节
  • 您很久以前卸载的应用程序中剩余的设置、缓存和支持文件
  • 旧的安装程序、手机备份、日志和您几个月没有碰过的大文件
  • 不知道什么实际使用了您的磁盘空间

观看演示

查看扫描结果、简单的英文故障分析以及点击即可清理——使用来自真实机器的真实数据。

▶ 在 YouTube 上观看 — 一分钟内回收千兆字节

截图

开发清理——每个已知的缓存位置、大小和评级

ML 模型 — 此处 21.7 GB 中的 21.1 GB 已下载且从未加载过一次

深度清理——文件夹大小根据其所容纳的内容而定，并诚实地告知无法读取的内容

特征

ML 模型 — 保留您使用的内容，删除您从未加载的内容。 每个下载的模型都单独列出，包括 Hugging Face、Ollama、Whisper、PyTorch 和 Keras。 Jharu 将您实际加载的模型与下载过一次且此后从未打开过的模型区分开来，因此您可以回收第二种模型而无需触及第一种模型。 保留模型之间共享的 Ollama 层，因此删除一个模型绝不会破坏另一个模型。 没有其他清洁工能做到这一点。

开发干净。 扫描 25 个以上已知的开发人员和机器学习缓存位置 - Hugging Face、Ollama、PyTorch、Whisper、LM Studio、conda、pip、uv、npm、yarn、pnpm、Cargo、Go 模块、Gradle、Maven、NuGet、Homebrew、Xcode DerivedData、Docker、JetBrains、Playwright、Puppeteer - 提供每个项目的安全评级和过时检测。

Python 环境。 查找每个 virtualenv 和 conda 环境，调整其中的包大小，并显示跨环境的重复成本 - 量化“torch 安装了 11 次”问题。

深层清洁。 以树形图或列表形式进行全磁盘分析。 文件夹的大小取决于其所容纳的内容，并分为系统、应用程序、文件、应用程序数据或开发人员数据。 单击一个块即可进入​​其中。 系统位置受到保护，永远无法从应用程序中清除。

垃圾文件。 非缓存垃圾：下载中的安装程序和存档、旧设备备份、日志和崩溃报告、邮件附件副本、六个月未触及的大文件，以及 Windows 上的临时文件夹、Windows 更新缓存、传递优化文件和故障转储。

桌面。 桌面上的屏幕截图和杂乱内容，可按类型和年龄进行过滤。 由于这些是您自己的文件，因此默认操作是将它们存档到文件夹而不是删除。

浏览器。 检测 Chrome、Edge、Brave、Arc、Firefox 和 Safari，并逐项列出每个配置文件的缓存，将安全清除的缓存与值得审查的数据分开。

卸载程序。 列出已安装的应用程序及其自身的大小以及它们在系统中积累的数据。 在 Windows 上，它读取注册表并运行每个程序自己的卸载程序；在 macOS 上，它会删除该捆绑包。 无论哪种方式，它都会清除剩余的内容，并预先选择高可信度的匹配项。

推动健康。 每个驱动器的容量和 SMART 状态，以及根据每日容量读数构建的填充预测，预测驱动器何时会用完空间。 当 smartctl 可用时，会显示磨损程度、温度和开机时间。

应用内更新。 Jharu 检查 GitHub 版本是否有新版本，并从应用程序内部下载并安装它们 - 签名、验证并一键重启。

贾鲁比较如何

通用清洁工的设计目的是为了看起来很忙并出售订阅。 Jharu 深入做了一件事：通用清洁工无法理解开发人员和人工智能数据。

Jharu 清理我的Mac CC清理器
Price 永远免费 $40+/yr 免费增值
开源 是 · 阿帕奇 2.0 No No
了解 ML 模型缓存 Yes No No
使用过与从未加载的检测 Yes No No
遥测/跟踪 None Yes Yes
macOS 和 Windows Both 仅限 macOS Both
注册表“清洁工” 从来不（这不起作用） — Yes

Jharu 可以清洁什么？

类别 示例
ML 模型缓存 Hugging Face 中心 (~/.cache/huggingface)、Ollama 模型 (~/.ollama/models)、PyTorch 中心、Whisper、Keras、LM Studio
Python pip 缓存、uv 缓存、conda 包缓存、陈旧的 conda 环境
JavaScript npm 缓存 (~/.npm/_cacache)、yarn 缓存、pnpm 商店、Puppeteer 和 Playwright 浏览器下载
构建工具 Xcode DerivedData 和档案、Gradle 缓存、Maven 存储库、Cargo 注册表、Go 模块缓存、NuGet 包
集装箱 Docker VM数据和镜像存储
IDEs JetBrains 缓存、编辑器缓存目录
应用剩菜 支持来自已卸载应用程序的文件、缓存、首选项和日志
Junk 下载中的安装程序、旧设备备份、崩溃报告、邮件附件副本、大型陈旧文件

安全模型

  • 没有任何东西会被永久删除。 每个清理操作都会将数据移至垃圾箱或回收站，以便可以将其恢复。
  • 每项发现都带有安全评级：可以安全清除、可重新下载或先审查。
  • 操作系统位置受到保护并完全排除在清理之外。
  • 每次清理都会通过一个对话框进行确认，该对话框会说明实际结果 - 缓存会自行重建，重新下载模型，必须重新创建环境，您自己的文件将永远消失。
  • 贾鲁无法读取的位置会被报告，而不会被隐藏。 需要提升权限的文件夹的大小为 0 B，看起来与空文件夹一模一样；贾鲁将这些标记为部分不可读，而不是悄悄地将它们排除在外。 隐藏看不见的东西的清洁工比承认它的清洁工更糟糕。
  • 没有注册表清理程序，Windows 预取已列出但从未清理。 两者都被广泛销售，但都没有任何用处；预取是 Windows 快速启动应用程序的方式，清除它会使下次启动速度变慢。

安装

适用于 macOS（Apple Silicon 和 Intel）和 Windows 的预构建安装程序已发布在发布页面上。 安装后，Jharu 会在应用程序内进行自我更新。

从源代码构建

先决条件：Rust（稳定）和 Node.js 20+。

git clone https://github.com/riponcm/Jharu.git
cd Jharu
npm install
npm run tauri dev      # run in development
npm run tauri build    # produce installers for your platform

在 macOS 上，授予完整磁盘访问权限（系统设置、隐私和安全）以实现完整的扫描覆盖。 Jharu 检测到缺少访问权限并提议打开右侧的设置窗格。

第一次打开贾鲁

Jharu 尚未使用付费开发者证书进行签名（请参阅下面的支持 Jharu），因此您的操作系统在您第一次打开它时会显示一次性警告。 这是开源应用程序所期望的，并不意味着有任何问题 - 下载是通过每个应用程序内更新的加密签名进行验证的。

  • macOS：如果您看到“Jharu 无法打开，因为 Apple 无法验证它”，请右键单击（或按住 Control 键单击）该应用程序并选择“打开”，然后确认。 您只需执行一次此操作。
  • Windows：如果 SmartScreen 显示“Windows 保护了您的电脑”，请单击“更多信息”，然后单击“仍然运行”。

常见问题

如何清除拥抱脸模型缓存？ 打开 Jharu 的 Dev clean 选项卡。 它会列出您的 Hugging Face 中心缓存 (~/.cache/huggingface) 及其确切大小，并让您探索它或将其移至垃圾箱。 下次图书馆请求时，模型会自动重新下载。

删除 npm、pip 或其他包管理器缓存是否安全？ 是的。 这些缓存只会加快重新安装速度，并在下次安装时自动重建。 贾鲁将它们标记为“可以安全清除”。 删除活动项目的 node_modules 或您仍在使用的 conda 环境是不同的 - Jharu 将这些评为“首先审核”。

Jharu 会永久删除我的文件吗？ 不会。每个清理操作都会将数据移至 macOS 垃圾箱或 Windows 回收站，以便可以将其恢复。 贾鲁从不绕过垃圾箱。

Jharu 是 CleanMyMac 或 CCleaner 的免费替代品吗？ 是的。 Jharu 在 Apache 2.0 许可证下免费且开源，无需订阅、遥测或追加销售。 它的关注点更窄、更深入：通用清洁工不理解的开发人员和机器学习数据。

如何查明 Mac 或 Windows PC 上的磁盘空间被哪些内容占用？ Jharu 的“深度清理”选项卡会分析整个磁盘并显示每个文件夹的实际大小，并按其内容（系统文件、应用程序、文档、应用程序数据或开发人员数据）进行分类，以便您可以区分垃圾数据和重要数据。

如何完全卸载应用程序，包括残留文件？ Jharu 的卸载程序列出了每个已安装的应用程序及其累积的数据。 卸载可一步删除应用程序及其剩余的支持文件、缓存和首选项。

建筑学

Layer 技术
扫描器 Rust 具有并行目录行走 (jwalk)
安全 操作系统垃圾集成（垃圾），永不永久删除
Rules 每个平台的缓存和数据位置知识库
UI React 和 TypeScript、Tauri 2 WebView
更新内容 tauri-plugin-updater 带有签名的 GitHub 发布工件
驾驶信息 sysinfo，通过 diskutil 和可选的 smartctl 进行 SMART
视窗 winreg 用于卸载密钥；每个平台的路径

支持贾鲁

Jharu 是免费、开源的，没有广告、遥测或付费层 - 并且永远如此。 但是，交付一个用户可以安装而没有可怕的安全警告的桌面应用程序每年都会花费大量资金，而这是单个开发人员无法单独承受的一件事：

它解锁什么 Cost
Apple 公证 — 删除每台 Mac 上的“Apple 无法验证此应用程序”警告 99 美元/年（Apple 开发者计划）
Windows 代码签名 — 删除“Windows 保护您的电脑”SmartScreen 警告 ~100–400 美元/年（代码签名证书）

每一位明星和每一项赞助都直接用于这些费用。 如果 Jharu 回收了 GB 的磁盘空间，您可以通过以下方法在几秒钟内将其转发：

  • 为存储库加注星标。 它是免费的，只需点击一下，这是帮助其他开发者发现 Jharu 的最重要的事情。
  • 赞助该项目。 即使是一杯咖啡大小的一次性捐款也有助于覆盖签名证书，使 Jharu 能够安全、无摩擦地供每个人安装。 使用此存储库顶部的赞助商按钮。
  • 传播这个词。 与磁盘总是满的队友分享 Jharu，或者发布有关它的信息 - 影响范围是将一个业余项目变成一个可维护的工具。

一旦支付了签名费用，每个版本都将在 macOS 和 Windows 上干净地安装，根本不会发出任何警告。 感谢您帮助贾鲁保持自由和独立。
